raw_response: Given your price sensitivity and budget constraints, the JBL Tune 770NC is an excellent choice. It offers solid value with its over-ear wireless design, decent noise cancellation, and a generous battery life of 44 hours. The punchy sound signature is well-suited for casual listening, and its foldable construction makes it easy to carry around. While the build quality is mostly plastic and lacks high-res codec support, it still delivers good performance within your budget constraints.
